title: Lab 8 — RBAC: Roles, RoleBindings, ServiceAccounts
description: Create a ServiceAccount for a read-only viewer persona, define a namespaced Role allowing get/list/watch on Pods, bind it to the SA, and prove the SA can read but cannot write.

steps.title: Step 1: Create a namespace and ServiceAccount
Step 3: Bind the Role to the ServiceAccount
Step 4: Test with kubectl auth can-i
Step 5: Test from inside a pod
